tim_cook.appearance: Tim Cook, CEO of Apple, a 63-year-old man with silver grey hair neatly combed to the side, clean-shaven, thin athletic build, rectangular glasses
tim_cook.default_outfit: dark navy suit with white dress shirt, no tie, open collar
tim_cook.default_setting: sleek minimalist Apple-style office with curved glass walls
tim_cook.lighting: soft warm side lighting with cool blue backlighting

jensen_huang.appearance: Jensen Huang, CEO of Nvidia, a 62-year-old Taiwanese-American man with short black and grey hair, clean-shaven, stocky athletic build, warm face
jensen_huang.default_outfit: signature black leather jacket over black t-shirt
jensen_huang.default_setting: high-tech stage with GPU architecture displayed behind
jensen_huang.lighting: dramatic stage lighting with green and gold highlights

sam_altman.appearance: Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, a 41-year-old man with short curly dark brown hair, clean-shaven, slim build, youthful face
sam_altman.default_outfit: grey crew neck sweater over collared shirt
sam_altman.default_setting: modern minimalist tech office with warm lighting and crowd behind him
sam_altman.lighting: soft diffused golden lighting from above

dario_amodei.appearance: Dario Amodei, CEO of Anthropic, a 41-year-old man with thick curly dark brown hair, glasses with thin frames, medium build
dario_amodei.default_outfit: dark navy sweater or casual button-down shirt
dario_amodei.default_setting: research lab with screens showing AI data
dario_amodei.lighting: cool blue ambient light with warm golden accents

elon_musk.full_name: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX
elon_musk.appearance: Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, a 54-year-old man with receding light brown hair, clean-shaven, slightly stocky athletic build, prominent brow
elon_musk.default_outfit: black t-shirt or dark casual blazer, never formal suit and tie
elon_musk.default_setting: SpaceX rocket launch site at dusk or Tesla factory floor
elon_musk.lighting: harsh industrial lighting with golden highlights

satya_nadella.appearance: Satya Nadella, CEO of Microsoft, a 58-year-old Indian man with completely shaved bald head, glasses with thin dark frames, medium build
satya_nadella.default_outfit: dark suit with no tie, open collar
satya_nadella.default_setting: modern Microsoft campus with glass walls
satya_nadella.lighting: soft warm lighting with blue tech accents

mark_zuckerberg.appearance: Mark Zuckerberg, CEO of Meta, a 42-year-old man with short curly brown hair, clean-shaven, slim build, boyish face
mark_zuckerberg.default_setting: Meta campus with VR headset visible in background

sundar_pichai.full_name: Sundar Pichai, CEO of Alphabet and Google
sundar_pichai.appearance: Sundar Pichai, CEO of Google, a 53-year-old Indian man with dark hair greying at temples, clean-shaven, slim build
sundar_pichai.default_outfit: dark blazer over light shirt, no tie
sundar_pichai.default_setting: Google office with colorful ambient lighting
sundar_pichai.lighting: soft warm lighting with multicolor reflections

andy_jassy.appearance: Andy Jassy, CEO of Amazon, a 57-year-old man with curly dark hair, clean-shaven, medium build
andy_jassy.default_setting: Amazon fulfillment center or AWS data center
andy_jassy.lighting: cool industrial lighting with orange AWS accents

greg_abel.full_name: Greg Abel, CEO of Berkshire Hathaway
greg_abel.appearance: Greg Abel, CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, a 62-year-old man with grey hair, clean-shaven, tall build, strong jawline
greg_abel.default_setting: traditional corporate boardroom with wood paneling

alex_karp.appearance: Alex Karp, CEO of Palantir, a 57-year-old man with wild curly grey-white hair, thin build, distinctive eccentric look
alex_karp.default_outfit: unconventional dark outfit, sometimes with scarf

warren_buffett.full_name: Warren Buffett, former CEO of Berkshire Hathaway
warren_buffett.appearance: Warren Buffett, legendary investor, a 95-year-old man with thin white hair, round glasses, gentle face
warren_buffett.default_setting: simple office with Omaha skyline behind

michael_saylor.full_name: Michael Saylor, Executive Chairman of Strategy (MicroStrategy)
michael_saylor.appearance: Michael Saylor, CEO of MicroStrategy, a tall lean man in his late 50s with dark slicked-back hair brushed straight back, strong angular jawline, clean-shaven, intense dark eyes
michael_saylor.default_outfit: dark navy suit with white dress shirt, no tie
michael_saylor.default_setting: dark trading floor with multiple screens showing Bitcoin charts
michael_saylor.lighting: dramatic blue and gold screen glow on face
michael_saylor.mood_positive: intense confident stare, conviction in eyes
michael_saylor.mood_negative: stern serious expression, jaw clenched, defiant

brian_armstrong.appearance: Brian Armstrong, CEO of Coinbase, a man in his early 40s, bald shaved head, clean-shaven, athletic build
brian_armstrong.default_outfit: dark navy quarter-zip pullover over dark t-shirt
brian_armstrong.default_setting: modern tech office with city skyline through floor-to-ceiling windows
brian_armstrong.lighting: warm golden side lighting with cool blue ambient

mark_cuban.appearance: Mark Cuban, billionaire investor, a man in his late 60s with thick dark brown hair slightly messy, clean-shaven, athletic build
mark_cuban.default_outfit: dark navy blazer over a black t-shirt, casual
mark_cuban.default_setting: modern office with city lights visible through windows
mark_cuban.mood_negative: serious intense expression with furrowed brow

jamie_dimon.full_name: Jamie Dimon, CEO of JPMorgan Chase
jamie_dimon.appearance: Jamie Dimon, CEO of JPMorgan Chase, a 70-year-old man with silver grey hair combed back, clean-shaven, athletic build, strong jawline
jamie_dimon.default_outfit: dark navy suit with white shirt and blue tie
jamie_dimon.default_setting: Wall Street executive office with dark wood and city view

lisa_su.appearance: Lisa Su, CEO of AMD, a 55-year-old Taiwanese-American woman with straight dark black hair to shoulders, slim build
lisa_su.default_outfit: dark blazer over dark top, professional but modern
lisa_su.default_setting: semiconductor lab or data center with server racks
lisa_su.lighting: cool blue tech lighting with warm highlights

ryan_cohen.appearance: Ryan Cohen, CEO of GameStop, a man in his late 30s with dark curly hair, light stubble, medium build, youthful face
ryan_cohen.default_outfit: casual dark shirt or blazer, no tie
ryan_cohen.default_setting: GameStop retail store or modern office
ryan_cohen.lighting: warm ambient lighting with neon accents

bob_iger.appearance: Bob Iger, CEO of Disney, a 74-year-old man with silver grey hair neatly styled, clean-shaven, tall slim build, polished look
bob_iger.default_outfit: dark tailored suit with open collar white shirt
bob_iger.default_setting: executive office or media event stage
bob_iger.lighting: soft warm lighting, classic Hollywood feel

larry_fink.appearance: Larry Fink, CEO of BlackRock, a 73-year-old man with grey hair, glasses, medium build
larry_fink.default_setting: Wall Street office with financial data screens

jerome_powell.full_name: Jerome Powell, Chair of the Federal Reserve
jerome_powell.appearance: Jerome Powell, Federal Reserve Chair, a 73-year-old man with silver grey hair parted to the side, clean-shaven, tall build
jerome_powell.default_outfit: dark suit with blue or red tie
jerome_powell.default_setting: Federal Reserve press conference podium with blue curtain behind
jerome_powell.lighting: bright press conference lighting with warm tones

masayoshi_son.appearance: Masayoshi Son, CEO of SoftBank, a 67-year-old Japanese man with thinning dark hair, glasses, medium build
masayoshi_son.default_outfit: dark suit with white shirt, no tie
masayoshi_son.default_setting: high-tech presentation stage with futuristic displays
masayoshi_son.lighting: bright stage lighting with blue and white accents
